title: Scotch Egg Schnitzel
description: A German-inspired twist on the classic Scotch egg, with a crispy schnitzel coating.
instructions: Cut the flour into a shallow dish.
Pour the milk into a separate shallow dish.
Beat the eggs in another shallow dish.
Dip each Scotch egg into the flour, then the milk, and finally the eggs.
Roll the egg in the bread crumbs to coat.
Heat the vegetable oil in a large frying pan over medium-high heat.
Add the coated Scotch egg to the hot oil and fry for 4-5 minutes on each side.
Drain the Scotch egg on paper towels.
